notices.title: App Welcome
notices.description: Hello, Every one in campus of our collage first of all contracts and welcome  in campus Hub a all rounder platform for you collage

notices.title: End Semester Examination Schedule Released
notices.description: The official examination timetable for Semester 6 has been published. Exams commence on June 22nd, 2026. Students must download hall tickets from the portal after verifying fee payment status. Any discrepancies should be reported to the examination cell within 3 working days.

notices.title: Smart India Hackathon 2026 — Campus Round
notices.description: Submit your team proposals for the campus shortlisting rounds of Smart India Hackathon 2026. Prizes up to ₹5,00,000 for top projects. Each team must have 6 members with at least one female participant. Faculty mentors are mandatory for submission approval. Last date: June 20th.

notices.title: Extended Library Hours During Exam Preparation
notices.description: To support students during examination preparation, the Central Library will operate on extended hours — open 24/7 from June 15th until July 10th. Night entry requires valid student ID. Refreshments available at the reading room cafeteria.

notices.title: Examination Fee Payment — Final Deadline
notices.description: Last date to pay Semester 6 examination fees without late fine is June 14, 2026. Late payment attracts a penalty of ₹500. Students with pending fees will not be issued hall tickets. Pay online through the Fee Portal or at the accounts office.

notices.title: Campus Placement Drive — TCS Digital
notices.description: TCS Digital is conducting an on-campus recruitment drive on June 25th. Eligible: B.Tech CSE/IT students with CGPA ≥ 7.5 and no active backlogs. Register on the placement portal by June 18th. Pre-placement talk on June 24th at 3 PM in Auditorium.

notices.title: Workshop on Generative AI — Registration Open
notices.description: A 2-day workshop on 'Building with Generative AI' will be held on July 5-6 in the CSE department. Topics include prompt engineering, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning LLMs. Limited to 60 seats. Register through the events section.

studyMaterials.title: RESTful API Design with Node.js & Express
studyMaterials.description: Comprehensive notes on designing RESTful APIs — routing, middleware, authentication patterns, and error handling strategies.
studyMaterials.subject: Advanced Web Systems

studyMaterials.title: NoSQL Databases & Mongoose ODM
studyMaterials.description: Deep dive into document databases, collection schemas, indexing, query optimization, and Mongoose validation patterns.
studyMaterials.subject: Distributed Databases

studyMaterials.title: Docker & Container Orchestration
studyMaterials.description: Practical guide to Docker — multi-stage builds, networking, volumes, Docker Compose, and CI/CD pipeline integration.
studyMaterials.subject: Cloud Security & DevOps

studyMaterials.title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning Fundamentals
studyMaterials.description: Introduction to neural network architectures — perceptrons, CNNs, RNNs, backpropagation, and practical TensorFlow examples.
studyMaterials.subject: AI and Machine Learning

studyMaterials.title: Lab Manual — Express.js Practical Exercises
studyMaterials.description: 10 hands-on lab exercises covering Express.js setup, CRUD APIs, authentication, file uploads, and deployment.
studyMaterials.subject: Advanced Web Systems

studyMaterials.title: Previous Year Question Paper — Sem 5
studyMaterials.description: Collection of previous 3 years question papers for Design & Analysis of Algorithms with solutions.
studyMaterials.subject: Design & Analysis of Algorithms

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: David Thomas, Andrew Hunt
books.description: Timeless advice on software craftsmanship, from coding to career development.

books.title: Design Patterns
books.author: Gamma, Helm, Johnson, Vlissides
books.description: The classic Gang of Four patterns for reusable object-oriented design.

books.title: Database System Concepts
books.author: Abraham Silberschatz
books.description: Comprehensive coverage of relational databases, SQL, transaction management, and query optimization.

books.title: Computer Networking: A Top-Down Approach
books.author: James Kurose
books.description: Network fundamentals from application layer to physical layer with hands-on labs.

books.title: Modern Operating Systems
books.author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum
books.description: Classic text on OS internals covering virtualization, threads, memory management, and filesystems.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: Essential guide to writing readable, maintainable, and professional software.

books.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
books.author: Stuart Russell, Peter Norvig
books.description: The most widely used AI textbook covering search, logic, probability, ML, and NLP.

books.title: Introduction to Algorithms
books.author: Cormen, Leiserson, Rivest, Stein
books.description: The definitive CLRS textbook on algorithm design and complexity analysis.

assignments.title: Build a REST API with Express.js
assignments.description: Create a CRUD API for a blog application with authentication, validation, and error handling.

assignments.title: MongoDB Schema Design Project
assignments.description: Design and implement a normalized + denormalized schema for an e-commerce platform. Include indexes and aggregation pipelines.

assignments.title: Dockerize a Full-Stack Application
assignments.description: Containerize a MERN stack application with Docker Compose. Include separate services for frontend, backend, and database.

notifications.title: Welcome to Campus Hub
notifications.message: Your verified student profile is active. Roll: SV-2026-089. Access all campus services from your dashboard.

notifications.title: Exam Fee Payment Due
notifications.message: Semester 6 examination fees (₹3,500) are due by June 14th. Pay through the Fees & Payments section.

notifications.title: Library Book Due Soon
notifications.message: 'Clean Code' by Robert C. Martin is due on June 11. Renew or return to avoid fines.

notifications.title: New Notice: Exam Schedule Released
notifications.message: End Semester Examination schedule has been published. Check the Notice Board for details.

notifications.title: Placement Drive — TCS Digital
notifications.message: TCS Digital campus recruitment drive on June 25th. CGPA ≥ 7.5 required. Register by June 18th.

notifications.title: Overdue Book Alert
notifications.message: 'Introduction to Algorithms' was due on April 29. Fine of ₹50 has been applied. Return immediately.

notifications.title: Payment Successful
notifications.message: Payment of ₹3500 for examination fees processed. Ref: TXN-28443423.
